root_cause_summary: The usage ingest request reused a transaction_id from an earlier logical event.
root_cause_details: The second request was rejected because transaction_id tx-dup-001 had already been accepted for a previous event.
resolution_summary: Generated a new transaction_id for the distinct event and confirmed it was accepted.
resolution_steps: Located the original transaction in Event Search.
Compared the original event with the retry payload.
Submitted the distinct event with a new transaction_id.
verification_steps: Use Event Search to verify the original transaction.
Verify the corrected event uses a new transaction_id.
Verify invoice usage reflects only one logical event for each transaction.
verification_results: Event Search showed the original transaction already existed.
The corrected event used a new transaction_id.
Invoice usage reflected the intended events without duplicate counting.
